page.description: Read one MDN documentation page as plain-text sections by its slug.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous call to continue reading sections.

limit.description: Maximum sections to return in one call.

slug.description: Page slug from search results, such as Web/API/Fetch_API.

output_schema.description: One MDN page split into readable sections.

sections.description: Page body sections in reading order.

content.description: Section content as plain text; empty for non-prose sections.

heading.description: Section heading; empty for the lead section.

summary.description: One-paragraph page summary; null when MDN provides none.

url.description: Relative MDN URL of the page.

pagination.behavior: Local cursor pagination over page sections; pass limit and the returned next_cursor.

page.when_not_to_use: Do not guess slugs; find them with search first.
page.when_to_use: Use this after search to read the actual documentation content of a page.

search.description: Full-text search across MDN Web Docs for web platform documentation.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

locale.description: Documentation locale, such as en-US or fr.

query.description: Search terms, such as 'fetch abort' or 'css grid template'.

output_schema.description: MDN search results for the query.

items.description: Matching MDN pages, best match first.

slug.description: Page slug usable with the page operation, such as Web/API/Fetch_API.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of the page; null when MDN provides none.

url.description: Relative MDN URL of the page.

pagination.behavior: Returns MDN's first page of results (10 best matches).

search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for Python or non-web library docs; use readthedocs. Fetch a known page with page.
search.when_to_use: Use this to find the MDN page for a web API, JavaScript method, CSS property, or HTML element.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.
